creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: I wouldn't say it obviates the need for all powerpc.  powerpcspe is stuck at gcc8.  The set of powerpcspe users is probably extremely small, but I don't want to see gcc8 go away until it's really necessary (needed for FreeBSD 12 at least, that's still gcc based, making good progress on clang, but still a couple hiccups I need to sort out before I can completely drop gcc on 13).
